title: lygistum marginatum
intro: Lygistum marginatum, also known as Lygus marginatus, is a plant species within the family Apiaceae, commonly referred to as a type of wild parsley or sea parsley. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. Consuming Lygus marginatus has been associated with various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Lygus marginatus is often prepared as an infusion or decoction to utilize its medicinal properties, and it is also used as a culinary herb in some parts of the world.
